steps.t: Veins of gems can be found near Lyndelby. You should gather the gems for Húbald Túcca.
A grindstone can be found in Lyndelby. You should smooth down the gems you gathered.
The tribute barrel can be found in Lyndelby. You should place the smoothed gems in the barrel for Húbald Túcca.
The tribute barrel can be found in Lyndelby. You should pick up the barrel.
The tribute spot can be found west of Lyndelby. You should place the tribute barrel at the tribute spot.
Landroval can be found at the tribute spot. You should greet Landroval.
Landroval can be found at the tribute spot. You should talk to Landroval.
Húbald Túcca can be found in Lyndelby. You should talk to Húbald Túcca.
